headline: Unpacking Q4 Earnings: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) In The Context Of Other Building Materials Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the building materials industry, including Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) and its peers.
